results.evidence: python -m pytest: 327 passed, 1 skipped (opt-in live API test).

results.description: Exact CMS export headers and order
results.evidence: Registry and end-to-end workbook reopen/header tests passed for all sets.
Offline fake-client workflows passed for all seven sets.
All five mandatory profiles passed applicability and request-payload isolation tests.

results.description: Human approval of frozen evaluation data
results.evidence: 13-case engineering fixture is validated but explicitly not human-approved ground truth.
results.reason: A reviewer must approve representative cases and labels for every set/profile.

results.description: Live comparison of at least two approved models
results.evidence: The two-model runner passed with deterministic fake clients only.
results.reason: Two approved model IDs, credentials, pricing, and an approved golden dataset are required.

results.evidence: Metric formula and positive/negative deterministic leakage cases passed; engineering fixture rate 0/4.
SSRF, redirects, DNS/IP pinning, deadlines, retries, sizes, decoding, naming, and output tests passed.
Credential, bearer, named-secret, URL-userinfo, exception, SQLite, and report redaction tests passed.
Successful units persist; failed/interrupted units resume without duplicate successful calls; partial QC export passed.
Cancellation stops new scheduling, preserves completed work, leaves pending units resumable, and clears on resume.
Planned/actual calls, retries, usage, cache hits, configured pricing, unavailable cost, and hard call/cost breakers are implemented and tested.

results.description: Backup and migration documentation and checks
results.evidence: SQLite online backup, integrity reopen, transactional migrations, and operator procedures passed.
User, deployment, backup, release, rollback, troubleshooting, and limitation guides are present.
Linux requirements and safe deployment controls are documented; no host/container/auth choice was invented.
results.reason: Approve a production host, authentication method, storage/backup target, and private network exposure.

results.evidence: Every unresolved decision is listed with safe pending behavior.
results.reason: Permitted values, semantic mappings, copy rules, thresholds, models, pricing, retention, and output format require approval.
